creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would like to request an exp-run before committing Mono 2.10.1 into
the tree.  The patch updates ~30 ports, marks multimedia/moonlight as
BROKEN and multimedia/banshee as IGNORE (it is unstable and old Banshee
does not compile with the new version of mono).

Fix: 

The patch is not sexy to avoid conflicts w/ VCS keywords.  I can update
it easily in case it does not apply anymore:
http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.1.diff

'patch -up0 --quiet' was happy with it on a fresh ports tree this
morning (CET).
